# VoiceInsert

> macOS menu bar app: hold a shortcut, speak, release — text into the focused field or Obsidian as Markdown. On-device Apple speech. macOS 13+.

## Site

- Home: /
- FAQ (macOS dictation, Obsidian, permissions, privacy): /faq

## Source

- Open source (MIT), GitHub releases distribute VoiceInsert-macos.zip.

## Do not

- Crawl /gate, /api/, /success (utility or non-content URLs).
